title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for PayPal Alternatives for Nigerian Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: For Nigerian creators, selling digital products can be a nightmare when PayPal is not an option. PayPal restrictions in Nigeria leave you with limited choices for receiving payments. You can't rely on Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, which also exclude you from their services. Your digital store remains locked, unable to access the international market. It's time to break free from these restrictions with a reliable PayPal alternative.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal alternatives like Stripe and Gumroad promise flexibility but often come with their own set of problems. They require you to create an account, which may not be feasible in countries with strict banking regulations. Moreover, their payment processing fees can be exorbitant, eating into your profits. In contrast, a dedicated digital store platform like Core Shop Engine provides a full backend with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. This means you don't need a payment processor account, and you can focus on selling your digital products without worrying about the technicalities.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan are often blacklisted by popular payment gateways due to regulatory issues or high-risk transactions. However, Core Shop Engine bypasses these restrictions by integrating with a range of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Ethereum. This means you can sell your digital products without relying on traditional payment processors, making it an ideal solution for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed and fees, traditional payment processors like Stripe and Gumroad can be slow and expensive. They often charge high transaction fees, which can range from 2.9% to 5% per transaction. In contrast, Core Shop Engine's payment processing fees are significantly lower, allowing you to keep more of your hard-earned profits. Plus, with automated delivery and payment verification, you can focus on growing your business without worrying about payment delays or disputes.
Core Shop Engine's automated delivery and payment verification capabilities ensure seamless transactions and reduce payment disputes.

Automation is the key to running a seamless digital store. Core Shop Engine's bot engine and automated delivery capabilities ensure that customers receive their purchases instantly, without any manual intervention. This means you can focus on creating new content and promoting your store, while the technicalities are taken care of. Additionally, with PDF receipts and payment verification, you can maintain a professional image and build trust with your customers.
